layout.description: Button layout style (default: filled with rounded corners, outlined: border with rounded corners, sharp: filled with no radius, plain: no background or border, rounded: fully rounded/pill shape)

isLoading.description: Show loading spinner and disable interaction

leftIcon.description: Icon to display on the left side of the button

rightIcon.description: Icon to display on the right side of the button

onClick.description: Click event handler (supports async functions for automatic loading state)

loadingMessage.description: Message to display while loading (also announced via aria-live for screen readers)

waitFor.description: Countdown timer in seconds before button becomes clickable

href.description: URL to navigate to (renders as link)

fullWidth.description: Stretch the button to fill the width of its container (common for modal footers and forms)

tooltip.description: Tooltip content shown on hover/focus. Renders the button wrapped in a Tooltip — useful for icon-only buttons where a tooltip is mandatory for accessibility

tooltipPlacement.description: Placement of the tooltip when tooltip prop is provided

confirmText.description: When set, the first click shows a confirm popover; the popover Confirm action runs onClick. Useful for destructive actions

confirmTitle.description: Title of the confirm popover when confirmText is set

confirmOkText.description: Label of the confirm action button

confirmCancelText.description: Label of the cancel action button
